PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 18344 -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location "d:/桌面文件下载/cc_test"; node dev-server.js }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Receive-Job $job -Keep | Select-Object -First 5)

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "dev-server.js" -WorkingDirectory "d:/桌面文件下载/cc_test" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Write-Host "Started PID: $\($proc.Id\)"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $body = '{"userName":"TestUser3","contact":"13911111111","products":[],"estimatedTotal":7777}'; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/inquiry/create" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5)

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Id -ne $PID } | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "dev-server.js" -WorkingDirectory "d:/桌面文件下载/cc_test" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Host "Server PID: $\($proc.Id\)"; $body = '{"userName":"李明","contact":"13800138000","products":[{"name":"iPhone 14 Pro","category":"手机","brand":"Apple","thumbnail":null,"estimatedPrice":"3500","condition":"used","quantity":2},{"name":"MacBook Air M2","category":"笔记本","brand":"Apple","thumbnail":null,"estimatedPrice":"6800","condition":"like_new","quantity":1}],"estimatedTotal":13800}'; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/inquiry/create" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json"; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6)

PowerShell($headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $\(git -C 'd:/桌面文件下载/cc_test' config --get credential.helper\)" }; Write-Host "checking vercel check runs"; $result = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/vervegrow-cmyk/Inventory-Liquidity-AI/commits/2e33cae/check-runs" -Headers @{ "User-Agent" = "curl" } -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $result.check_runs | Select-Object name, conclusion, @{n='summary';e={$_.output.summary}} | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell($tokenContent = Get-Content "d:/桌面文件下载/cc_test/.vercel/project.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; $projectId = $tokenContent.projectId; Write-Host "Project ID: $projectId"; $vercelToken = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Administrator\\AppData\\Roaming\\com.vercel.cli\\auth.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty token -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($vercelToken\) { Write-Host "Token found" } else { Write-Host "No token, trying global config"; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA" -Filter "auth.json" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName })
